summary: The public portfolio export includes the transparent HRM community response-priority scoring path.
Formula and weight parity are checked by scripts/numerical_parity_check.py.
Restricted diagnostic experiment outputs were excluded from the public export.
Validation evidence should be described as ranking-oriented replay evidence, not operational proof.
limitations: Community geometry uses centroid proxies unless official polygons are integrated.
Some features are seed or derived proxies.
Replay validation may contain same-source bias where historical prior and observed replay labels share source material.
Advanced ML experiments are not part of the public production demo path.
